lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: You want help [Tzhaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a fire cape here.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Indeed, JalYt. You want to sell it back? I swap it for 8,000 TokKul if you want.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Wise choice, JalYt.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Wise choice, JalYt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if I might take on a TzHaar apprentice instead?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Maybe. Give me fire cape. If you make lucky tokkul toss, apprentice trust you, JalYt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't I get the cape back?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: No. Try or no try. There is no cape back.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: You lucky. Better train him good else TzTok-Jad find you, JalYt.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: You not lucky. Maybe next time, JalYt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll keep my cape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: This is the fight cave, TzHaar-Xil made it for practice, but many JalYt come here to fight too. Just enter the cave and make sure you're prepared.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any rules?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Rules? Survival is the only rule in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I win anything?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: You ask a lot of questions. Might give you TokKul if you last long enough.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Before you ask, TokKul is like your Coins.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Gold is like you JalYt, soft and easily broken, we use hard rock forged in fire like TzHaar!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you call me?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Are you not [TzHaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a '[TzHaar caste]'?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: That what you are... you tough and strong no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: That what you are... you user of mystic powers no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: That what you are... you agile and quick no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well yes I suppose I am...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Then you [TzHaar caste]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you then?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Foolish JalYt, I am TzHaar-Mej, one of the mystics of this city.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What other types are there?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: There are the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food, and the skilled TzHaar-Hur who craft our homes and tools.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah ok then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for explaining it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess so...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Well then, no problems.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm not!

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm fine thanks.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: You're on your own now JalYt, prepare to fight for your life!

sections.title: Upon dying/leaving in the first round

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Well I suppose you tried... better luck next time.

sections.title: Upon losing/leaving in the fight cave

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Well done in the cave, here take TokKul as reward.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the fight cave before 5 minute wait time is up

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Hey, JalYt, you were in cave only a moment ago. You wait [amount] minutes/a minute or so/a bit before going in again.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: Look out, here comes TzTok-Jad!

sections.title: Upon winning in the fight cave

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Jal
lines.text: You even defeated TzTok-Jad, I am most impressed! Please accept this gift. Give cape back to me if you not want it.
